streams.name: Accenture - Salary
streams.notes: Senior Product Manager. $110k gross, ~28% effective tax rate. Bi-weekly deposit ~$3,437.

streams.name: Freelance UX Consulting
streams.notes: Variable $1k–$1.5k/month via Stripe or PayPal. Set aside 25% for quarterly estimated taxes. Jan: $1,100 | Feb: $1,400 | Mar: $1,050.
